business_definition: Unique synthetic identifier for a finalized prior claim.
Policy linked to the historical claim.
usage_and_constraints: Foreign key to Item #4 Policy Eligibility Lookup.

business_definition: Synthetic customer alias linked to the policy.
Covered-device record associated with the historical claim.
usage_and_constraints: Foreign key to Item #4 Policy Eligibility Lookup.

business_definition: Protection plan attached to the policy at the time of the historical claim.
usage_and_constraints: Foreign key to Item #2 Plan Master and Item #4 lookup.

business_definition: Date on which the historical incident occurred.
usage_and_constraints: Must fall during an active, non-suspended coverage interval for this synthetic dataset.

business_definition: Date the historical claim was reported.
usage_and_constraints: Must be on or after incident_date and before the record snapshot date.
Allowed values: SCREEN_DAMAGE, ACCIDENTAL_DAMAGE, LIQUID_DAMAGE, MECHANICAL_BREAKDOWN, THEFT, LOSS.

business_definition: Final post-processing outcome of the historical claim.
usage_and_constraints: Allowed values: SETTLED, DECLINED, WITHDRAWN. This is not an Item #1 triage disposition.

business_definition: Resolution delivered for a settled claim.
usage_and_constraints: Allowed values: REPAIR, REPLACEMENT, NONE. NONE applies to DECLINED/WITHDRAWN.

business_definition: Structured reason for final historical closure.
usage_and_constraints: Examples: COVERED_CLAIM_SETTLED, PLAN_EXCLUSION, INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE, CLAIM_LIMIT_EXHAUSTED, CUSTOMER_WITHDREW_CLAIM.

business_definition: Whether the final historical claim consumes the plan annual claim allowance.
usage_and_constraints: TRUE only for SETTLED claims in this dataset; use for LIM-001.

business_definition: Whether the historical claim consumes the plan theft-specific allowance.
usage_and_constraints: TRUE only for SETTLED THEFT claims; use for LIM-002.

business_definition: Synthetic operational settlement amount for a settled claim.
usage_and_constraints: Blank when final_claim_status is DECLINED or WITHDRAWN; not used to make eligibility decisions.
USD for settled claims; blank otherwise.
All historical claims precede this date.
